title: Sonic Hedgehog in Neural Tube Patterning: From Morphogen Gradient to Therapeutic Target
description: A comprehensive review of the Sonic Hedgehog (SHH) signaling pathway's role as a master regulator of neural tube patterning. The article covers the foundational mechanisms of SHH as a morphogen, its interpretation by progenitor cells, experimental methodologies, and its dysregulation in disease contexts such as neural tube defects and cancer, making it a key therapeutic target.
